case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PHILIDELPHIA REINSURANCE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-11-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND EXONERATE BAIL
